title: Maastricht University
text: Home * Organizations * Maastricht University Maastricht University [1] Maastricht University , Maastricht , The Netherlands . Contents 1 Important UM Dates 2 People 3 Chess Programs and Authors 4 Tournaments 5 Conferences 6 External Links 7 References Important UM Dates [ edit ] Until 1996 the University of Limburg in Maastricht [2] In 1996 name change to 'Universiteit Maastricht' [3] 11 January 2008: Name change to 'Maastricht University' Until 2008 associated with the Editorial Board of the ICGA Journal [4] .
